name: Dust of Appearance
description:
Use: Reveal

For %duration% seconds, creates an area that reveals and slows invisible heroes by %movespeed%%% in a %radius% radius where the caster was standing. Invisible units revealed by dust take %damage% damage.

The debuff effect on enemies lingers for %linger_duration%s after leaving the area of effect.
notes: Places a debuff on enemy units in the area that reveals them when they are invisible.
lore: One may hide visage, but never volume.
